title: RUIKASI Sherpa Blanket Throw for Bed, Fluffy Luxury Ribbed Blanket, Thick Warm Cozy Soft Fleece Blanket, Europe King 200x240 cm Green
features: Soft fleece & sherpa blanket: This fluffy blanket combines 270 g/m² flannel fleece with 230 g/m² sherpa, offering extra warmth and comfort. Ideal as a thick winter blanket for bed, a cosy sofa throw, or a soft sherpa fleece blanket for chilly evenings.

Modern ribbed throw design: Our 200x240 cm sherpa throw blanket features a stylish ribbed texture that adds a touch of elegance to your living room or bedroom. Use it as a sofa throw blanket, bed blanket or decorative fleece throw to enhance your home.

Multiple colours & sizes: Available in several colours and sizes, including the versatile 200x240 cm Europe King throw blanket, this fluffy fleece throw is perfect for sofa lounging, as a bed blanket, travel blanket or cosy sherpa throw – suitable for all seasons.

Quality workmanship: Made with reinforced stitching and durable edges, this sherpa fleece blanket is designed for long-lasting use. It is OEKO-TEX certified, ensuring a high-quality and safe experience.

Easy care & machine washable: This sherpa fleece throw blanket can be machine washed on a gentle cycle and tumble dried on low. No bleach or fabric softener. It keeps its fluffy texture, colour and shape – a practical and cosy blanket for everyday use.
